title: GHG Emission Inventory Management Software Comparison: GHG Inventory vs Emission Register vs Gas Ledger for Small Business - 2026 Review
description: Comprehensive comparison of GHG Inventory, Emission Register, and Gas Ledger GHG emission inventory management software. Analyzing inventory preparation, emission factors, and report generation capabilities to help small businesses choose the best GHG emission inventory solution. Learn more about features and pricing comparison to find your ideal solution! Professional reviews to guide your decision!
content:
GHG Emission Inventory Management Software Background

In 2026, GHG emission inventory has become the core archive for enterprise carbon emission management. Whether annual carbon emission report, regulatory emission disclosure, or carbon trading participation, all need standardized GHG emission inventory. SMEs face three major pain points in GHG emission inventory: non-standard inventory preparation (emission source identification, emission quantity statistics incomplete), difficult emission factor selection (different energy, different region factor differences), tedious report generation (inventory report preparation cost high). Professional GHG emission inventory management software can standardize inventory preparation, guide emission factor selection, automated report generation, helping enterprises reduce inventory preparation costs, improve data accuracy, meet regulatory disclosure requirements. This article will review three mainstream GHG emission inventory management software to provide reference for SME selection.

Core Feature Comparison Table

Feature DimensionGHG InventoryEmission RegisterGas LedgerSME Suitability
Inventory PreparationEmission source identification + emission quantity statisticsEmission quantity recordEmission source inventoryGHG Inventory preparation most standardized
Emission FactorEmission factor database richEmission factor selectionEmission factor archivingGHG Inventory factor most rich
Data CollectionERP integration + manual entryManual entry mainlyData archivingGHG Inventory collection automation strong
Report GenerationInventory report automationInventory report templateInventory report generationGHG Inventory report efficiency highest
VisualizationInventory dashboard + emission chartEmission chartInventory chartGHG Inventory visualization strongest
PriceAnnual fee $12,000+Annual fee $6,000+Annual fee $4,000+Gas Ledger price lowest

GHG Inventory GHG Emission Inventory Platform Detailed Explanation

GHG Inventory is a professional GHG emission inventory management platform, emphasizing standardized inventory preparation.

  • Core Capabilities: Emission source identification + emission quantity statistics, emission source comprehensive identification + emission quantity systematic statistics; emission factor database rich, covering 200+ country energy emission factors; ERP integration + manual entry, data collection automation + manual supplement; inventory report automatic generation, compliance report one-click completion; inventory dashboard + emission chart visualization, emission configuration intuitive display.
  • Technical Advantages: Inventory preparation most standardized, emission source + emission quantity dual preparation; emission factor most rich, 200+ country energy factor coverage; data collection automation strong, ERP integration reduces manual; report automation efficiency high, inventory workload reduced 50%; visualization dashboard rich, emission configuration intuitive display.
  • Disadvantage Analysis: Price relatively high, SME subscription burden larger; emission factor database needs update, latest factor may missing; Chinese inventory report templates need customization.
  • Price System: Platform annual fee $12,000-25,000; emission factor service fee $3,000; ERP integration service fee $2,000.

Emission Register GHG Emission Inventory Platform Detailed Explanation

Emission Register is an emission registration management platform, emphasizing emission quantity record and affordable price.

  • Core Capabilities: Emission quantity record, emission quantity data record archiving; emission factor selection, emission factor basic selection; manual entry mainly, data entry manual input; inventory report template, compliance report template filling; emission chart visualization, emission result chart display.
  • Technical Advantages: Price affordable, SME budget controllable; emission factor selection convenient, factor selection clear guidance; deployment cycle short, 2 weeks online; user interface simple, learning cost low.
  • Disadvantage Analysis: Inventory preparation non-standard, only emission quantity record archiving; emission factor not rich, only basic factor selection; data collection not automatic, only manual entry input; report automation efficiency medium, template filling needs manual; visualization effect basic, only emission chart display.
  • Price System: Platform annual fee $6,000-12,000; suitable for budget-limited SMEs.

Gas Ledger GHG Emission Inventory Platform Detailed Explanation

Gas Ledger is an emission ledger management platform, emphasizing emission source inventory and lowest price.

  • Core Capabilities: Emission source inventory, emission source data inventory organization; emission factor archiving, emission factor data archiving; data archiving, emission data archiving management; inventory report generation, compliance report basic generation; inventory chart visualization, inventory result chart display.
  • Technical Advantages: Price lowest, SME budget most controllable; emission source inventory clear, emission source inventory organization complete; deployment cycle shortest, 1 week online; user interface simplest, learning cost lowest.
  • Disadvantage Analysis: Inventory preparation non-standard, only emission source inventory archiving; emission factor not rich, only factor data archiving; data collection not supported, only data archiving management; report automation efficiency lowest, report basic generation; visualization effect most basic, only inventory chart display.
  • Price System: Platform annual fee $4,000-8,000; suitable for minimum budget SMEs.

SME Selection Decision Matrix

Inventory NeedRecommended PlatformReasonEstimated Annual Cost
Inventory Preparation StandardizedGHG InventoryEmission source + emission quantity dual preparation$12,000-25,000
Emission Factor RichGHG Inventory200+ country energy factor coverage$15,000+
Data Collection AutomationGHG InventoryERP integration + manual entry$14,000+
Emission Quantity RecordEmission RegisterEmission record + affordable price$6,000-12,000
Budget-Limited EnterpriseGas LedgerPrice lowest + rapid deployment$4,000

2026 GHG Emission Inventory Management Software Trend Prediction

In 2026, the GHG emission inventory management software market will show three major trends: first, AI inventory preparation, machine learning models automatically identify emission sources, recommend emission factors; second, real-time inventory update, emission data real-time collection, inventory real-time update; third, blockchain inventory attestation, inventory data on-chain storage, ensuring inventory cannot be tampered. SMEs should prioritize platforms supporting AI inventory preparation and real-time inventory update to reduce preparation costs.
author: GHG Inventory Management Consultant
